block.header: aki tu mi kamwi to opo ya sima sira si myesu sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,4@勅親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣,*

sentence.transcription: aki tu
mi kamwi to
opo ya sima sira si myesu
sumyera ga opo mikoto rama to noritamapu

sentence.kanji: 勅親王諸王諸臣百官人等天下公民衆聞食宣
sentence.transcription: opo mikoto wo mi kwo tati opo kimi tati omi tati tukasa dukasa no pito domo ame no sita no opo mi takara moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: kake maku mo kasikwo ki aki tu mi kamwi to imasu yamato ne kwo sumyera wa ga opo kimi ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza wo tutana ku wodina ki ware ni tamapari te tukape mature to opose tama pi saduke tama peba itadaki ni uke tamapa ri kasikwo mi uke tamapa ri odi susumi mo sira ni sirizoki mo sira ni kasikwo mi masa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,IP-ADV,IP-ADV,NP,3@倭根子天皇我皇此天日嗣高御座之業乎拙劣,*

sentence.transcription: kake maku mo kasikwo ki
aki tu
mi kamwi to imasu

sentence.kanji: 倭根子天皇我皇此天日嗣高御座之業乎拙劣
sentence.transcription: yamato ne kwo sumyera wa ga opo kimi ko no ama tu pi tugi taka mi kura no waza wo tutana ku wodina ki
ware ni tamapari te

sentence.kanji: 仕奉止仰賜比授賜閇波
sentence.transcription: tukape mature to opose tama pi saduke tama peba
itadaki ni uke tamapa ri
kasikwo mi uke tamapa ri
odi susumi mo sira ni

sentence.kanji: 退母不知尔恐美坐久止宣
sentence.transcription: sirizoki mo sira ni kasikwo mi masa ku to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: sikaredomo sumyera to imasi te ame no sita wosame tamapu kimi pa sakasi ki pito no yo ki omi wo e te si ame no sita woba tapirake ku yasurake ku wosamuru mono ni aru rasi to namo kikosi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,NP,7@物尔在良之止奈母聞行湏,*

sentence.transcription: sikaredomo
sumyera to imasi te
ame no sita wosame tamapu
kimi pa sakasi ki
pito no
yo ki omi wo e te si
ame no sita woba tapirake ku yasurake ku wosamuru

sentence.kanji: 物尔在良之止奈母聞行湏
sentence.transcription: mono ni aru rasi to namo kikosi mye su

block.header: kare koko wo motite opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ware pa tutana ku wodina ku aredomo mi kwo tati wo pazime te opo kimi tati omi tati no api ana napi matu ri api tasuke matura mu koto ni yori te si ko no opose tama pi saduke tama pu wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku yasurake ku tukape maturu besi to namo omoposi mye su

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@4,IP-ADV,PP-DAT,NP,IP-REL,3@王臣等乃相穴奈比奉利相扶奉牟,*
IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@4,IP-ADV,7@仕奉倍之止奈母所念行湏,*

sentence.transcription: kare koko wo motite
opo mikoto ni imase nori tamapa ku ware pa tutana ku wodina ku aredomo
mi kwo tati wo pazime te

sentence.kanji: 王臣等乃相穴奈比奉利相扶奉牟
sentence.transcription: opo kimi tati omi tati no api ana napi matu ri api tasuke matura mu
koto ni yori te si
ko no opose tama pi saduke tama pu

sentence.kanji: 食国天下之政者平久安久
sentence.transcription: wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa tapirake ku yasurake ku

sentence.kanji: 仕奉倍之止奈母所念行湏
sentence.transcription: tukape maturu besi to namo omoposi mye su

block.header: koko wo motite peturapi azamuku kokoro na ku mame ni aka ki makoto wo motite wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa moro moro tasuke tukape mature to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,3@食国天下之政者衆助仕奉止宣,*

sentence.transcription: koko wo motite
peturapi azamuku kokoro na ku
mame ni aka ki makoto wo motite

sentence.kanji: 食国天下之政者衆助仕奉止宣
sentence.transcription: wosu kuni ame no sita no maturi goto pa moro moro tasuke tukape mature to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

block.header: koto wakite nori tamapa ku tukape maturu pito domo no naka ni si ga tukape maturu sama ni sitagapi te pito ri puta ri domo no kagapuri kurawi age tama pi wosame tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV;@2,IP-ADV,3@一二人等冠位上賜比治賜夫,*

sentence.transcription: koto wakite nori tamapa ku tukape maturu
pito domo no naka ni si ga tukape maturu
sama ni sitagapi te

sentence.kanji: 一二人等冠位上賜比治賜夫
sentence.transcription: pito ri puta ri domo no kagapuri kurawi age tama pi wosame tama pu

block.header: tukasa dukasa no sikizi ywori kami tu kata to opo mi kamwi no miya wo pazime te yasiro yasiro no negwi papuri to ni opo mi mono tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,2@諸社弥冝祝尔大御物賜夫,*

sentence.transcription: tukasa dukasa no sikizi ywori kami tu kata to
opo mi kamwi no miya wo pazime te

sentence.kanji: 諸社弥冝祝尔大御物賜夫
sentence.transcription: yasiro yasiro no negwi papuri to ni opo mi mono tama pu

block.header: pousi no tukasa wo pazime te tera dera no si no kurawi no popusi ama domo ni mono podokosi tama pu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,1@諸寺師位僧尼等尔物布施賜夫,*

sentence.transcription: pousi no tukasa wo pazime te

sentence.kanji: 諸寺師位僧尼等尔物布施賜夫
sentence.transcription: tera dera no si no kurawi no popusi ama domo ni mono podokosi tama pu

block.header: mata tukasa dukasa no pito domo kuni guni no ikusa pito osape no ikusa umaya no pye domo no kotosi no ta tikara yurusi tamapa ku to noritamapu sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu

comment.raw: IP-MAT,IP-ADV,PP-OB1,NP,IP-REL,0@又百官司乃人等諸国兵士鎮兵伝駅戸等今年田租免賜久止宣,*

sentence.kanji: 又百官司乃人等諸国兵士鎮兵伝駅戸等今年田租免賜久止宣
sentence.transcription: mata tukasa dukasa no pito domo kuni guni no ikusa pito osape no ikusa umaya no pye domo no kotosi no ta tikara yurusi tamapa ku to noritamapu
sumyera ga opo mikoto wo moro moro kiki tamapeyo to noritamapu
